title: Special educational needs in England: January 2025
body: "This publication analyses the characteristics of pupils by their:   special educational needs provision type of need   It’s based on data collected through the:   school census general hospital school census school-level annual school census (SLASC) for independent schools    School census statistics team     Email sen.statistics@education.gov.uk         "

taxons.title: Special educational needs and disability (SEND) and high needs
